exercises.code:
# explorer/B2: completed from packet iDo for S13-T1-A-E2
def blocking_key(rec):
    toks = rec["name"].casefold().split()
    ap = toks[1] if len(toks) >= 2 else toks[0]
    return f"{ap}|{rec['region'].casefold()}"
print(blocking_key({"name": "Luis Huamán Soto", "region": "Cusco"}))
# B2 dual-run (Explorer): re-validated vs packet S13 S13-T1-A-E2
exercises.justification_from_packet: [B2-Explorer] Para S13-T1-A-E2 arranco citando el weDo: «E2 (independiente) — `blocking_key(rec)` = primer_apellido|region en casefold. Nombre 'Luis Huamán Soto', region 'Cusco'.». Veo en iDo `S13-T1-B-DEMO` (Emparejar 2 registros sintéticos por documento normalizado + bloque región.) → «». Hint weDo: «Último token no; usa el segundo token como apellido paterno o el último: documenta. Aquí:…». Traigo al code `blocking_key` + `def blocking_key` copiados del patrón. Teoria packet: «Normalización, blocking y entity resolution».

[B2-Explorer] Rehago S13-T1-A-E3 desde la instruction publicada: «E3 (transferencia) — `er_score(a,b)`: 1.0 si norm_doc igual y mismo blocking_key; 0.5 si solo doc; 0.0 si no. exercises.code:
# explorer/B2: completed from packet iDo for S13-T1-B-E2
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]
def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7):
    return [p["id"] for p in pairs if low <= p["score"] <= high]
print(clerical_queue(pairs))
# B2 dual-run (Explorer): re-validated vs packet S13 S13-T1-B-E2
exercises.justification_from_packet: [B2-Explorer] S13-T1-B-E2 — experimento con lo que el packet pide: «E2 (independiente) — `clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7)` devuelve ids con score en [low, high] inclusive.». Ancla iDo B2 `S13-T1-B-DEMO` (Emparejar 2 registros sintéticos por documento normalizado + bloque región.) → «». Hint weDo: «list comprehension con filtro de banda». Marca en code: `clerical_queue` + `def clerical_queue`. Teoria packet: «Verdad etiquetada, precision/recall y revisión clerical».

exercises.code:
# explorer/B2: completed from packet iDo for S13-T2-A-E1
def shared_email(a, b):
    return bool(a) and bool(b) and a.casefold() == b.casefold()
print(shared_email("Ana@Example.com", "ana@example.com"))
print(shared_email("", ""))
print(shared_email("a@x.com", "b@x.com"))
# B2 dual-run (Explorer): re-validated vs packet S13 S13-T2-A-E1

exercises.code:
# explorer/B2: completed from packet iDo for S13-T2-B-E1
txs = [("A","B",10), ("C","D",1), ("B","A",5)]
def direct_txs(txs, a, b):
    ends = {a, b}
    return [m for x, y, m in txs if {x, y} == ends]
print(direct_txs(txs, "A", "B"))
# B2 dual-run (Explorer): re-validated vs packet S13 S13-T2-B-E1

exercises.code:
# explorer/B2: completed from packet iDo for S13-T3-A-E2
def uncertainty_band(missing, conflict):
    if conflict or len(missing) >= 2:
        return "high"
    if missing:
        return "med"
    return "low"
print(uncertainty_band([], False))
print(uncertainty_band(["email"], False))
print(uncertainty_band(["email", "phone"], False))
print(uncertainty_band([], True))
# B2 dual-run (Explorer): re-validated vs packet S13 S13-T3-A-E2
exercises.justification_from_packet: [B2-Explorer] Walkthrough de S13-T3-A-E2: tomo la consigna weDo: «E2 (independiente) — `uncertainty_band(missing, conflict)` → high si conflict o len(missing)>=2; med si missing; low si no.». Plantilla iDo `S13-T3-A-DEMO` (Grafo simple A↔B y contraparte común D → lista RelationshipEvidence.) → «». Hint weDo: «Orden de ifs: conflict primero». Traigo al code `uncertainty_band` + `def uncertainty_band` copiados del patrón. Teoria packet: «De “RPA & automatización” al Familiarity Evidence Dashboard (mapa)».

selfcheck.chosen_text: Mantenerse separados en la ficha de caso
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: B2-Explorer: entity_resolution_score y relationship_signal_score deben mantenerse separados en la ficha de caso; no fusionarlos en un solo número sin etiqueta ni reemplazar por is_family.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Error de matching; no es veredicto legal de fraude
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: B2-Explorer: False positive de ER es error de matching; no es veredicto legal de fraude ni parentesco automático.
B2-Explorer: Zona gris de score: encolar needs_review / abstenerse según política; no auto_fraud=true ni setear is_family.
